title: Agentic Harness Loop Spec
description: A source-grounded structured description of one coding harness's agent loop. Drives both the prose docs and the interactive visualizer.

harness.description: Stable slug, matches the filename and docs/harnesses/<harness>.md.

loopStyle.description: One-line characterization of the loop architecture, e.g. 'async-generator streaming'.

entrypoint.description: Optional file:line of the loop entrypoint in the harness source.

kind.description: Fixed vocabulary so node types are comparable and colorable across harnesses.

sourceRef.description: Reference into the harness source. For live repos (opencode/pi/code_puppy) this is path:line at the pinned SHA. For Claude Code it is file-level only — the source is an old leaked/recovered snapshot, so exact lines are deliberately omitted (see docs/methodology.md).

note.description: Short explanation of what happens at this node.

on.description: Condition that selects this edge, e.g. 'tool_use', 'end_turn', 'allow', 'deny'.

scenarios.description: Walkthroughs animated by the visualizer. Scenario ids must stay in parity across all harnesses.

id.description: Shared scenario vocabulary — the basis of the side-by-side comparison view.

steps.description: Ordered list of node ids the loop traverses for this scenario.
